privileged_info_summary: No verified privileged information available. The task.json file does not contain a 'metadata' field with claims to verify. The task is a functional test for Nuxeo Platform 10.10 that requires creating a new Workspace named 'Marketing Materials' inside the 'Workspaces' section of the Default Domain via the web UI. The setup uses Nuxeo 10.10 (Docker container) with PostgreSQL 11 backend, REST API at http://localhost:8080/nuxeo/api/v1, and default credentials (Administrator:Administrator).
